task_snapshots.title: 369-04 — Evolution Pipeline Integration & Validation
task_snapshots.description:
Integrate AdaptiveGovernor into the evolution loop. Modify src/bernstein/core/evolution.py:
1. Instantiate AdaptiveGovernor at evolution start
2. Call adjust_weights(project_context) before each scoring cycle
3. For each proposal, call compute_risk() and store RiskAssessment
4. Route proposals by risk: >0.6 to sandbox_verify, 0.3-0.6 to standard apply, <0.3 to fast_track
5. Call log_evolution_decision() with full cycle metadata

Modify src/bernstein/core/orchestrator.py:
1. Initialize AdaptiveGovernor in evolve mode
2. Pass governor to evolution loop

Add 12+ integration tests validating: weight adjustment timing, risk computation in pipeline, routing logic, governance logging. Verify .sdd/metrics/governance_log.jsonl gets populated during evolution cycles. All tests pass.

[subtask of 53e205b6e23e]
